heading: Administration of acquired fractional interests; disposition of proceeds
label: 2213 Administration of acquired fractional interests; disposition of proceeds
notes: References in Text, referred to in the original in subsec. (b)(4), probably should have been “section 216”, meaning , which is classified to and relates to the establishment of an Acquisition Fund. does not contain a section 2215.Section 2215 of this titlesection 216 of Pub. L. 97–459section 2215 of this titlePub. L. 97–459

Amendments2004—Subsec. (b). added subsec. (b) and struck out heading and text of former subsec. (b) which related to conditions applicable to the administration by Indian tribes of acquired fractional interests in trust or restricted lands.Pub. L. 108–374
amendments: Amendments2004—Subsec. (b). added subsec. (b) and struck out heading and text of former subsec. (b) which related to conditions applicable to the administration by Indian tribes of acquired fractional interests in trust or restricted lands.Pub. L. 108–374

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the conditions described in subsection (b)(1), an Indian tribe receiving a fractional interest under may, as a tenant in common with the other owners of the trust or restricted lands, lease the interest, sell the resources, consent to the granting of rights-of-way, or engage in any other transaction affecting the trust or restricted land authorized by law.section 2212 of this title

children.heading: Application of revenue from acquired interests to land consolidation program
children.label: b Application of revenue from acquired interests to land consolidation program

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall have a lien on any revenue accruing to an interest described in subsection (a) until the Secretary provides for the removal of the lien under paragraph (3), (4), or (5).

children.label: i
children.text: any lease, resource sale contract, right-of-way, or other document evidencing a transaction affecting the interest shall contain a clause providing that all revenue derived from the interest shall be paid to the Secretary; and

children.label: ii
children.text: any revenue derived from any interest acquired by the Secretary in accordance with shall be deposited in the fund created under .section 2212 of this titlesection 2215 of this title

children.heading: Approval of transactions
children.label: B Approval of transactions
children.text: Notwithstanding , or any other provision of law, until the Secretary removes a lien from an interest in land under paragraph (1), the Secretary may approve a transaction covered under this section on behalf of an Indian tribe.section 5123 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the costs of administering the interest from which revenue accrues under the lien will equal or exceed the projected revenues for the parcel of land involved;

children.label: B
children.text: in the discretion of the Secretary, it will take an unreasonable period of time for the parcel of land to generate revenue that equals the purchase price paid for the interest; or

children.label: C
children.text: a subsequent decrease in the value of land or commodities associated with the parcel of land make it likely that the interest will be unable to generate revenue that equals the purchase price paid for the interest in a reasonable time.

children.heading: Removal of liens upon payment into the acquisition fund
children.label: 4 Removal of liens upon payment into the acquisition fund
children.text: The Secretary shall remove a lien referred to in paragraph (1) upon payment of an amount equal to the purchase price of that interest in land into the Acquisition Fund created under section 2215 of this title, except where the tribe with jurisdiction over such interest in land authorizes the Secretary to continue the lien in order to generate additional acquisition funds.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Other removal of liens
children.label: 5 Other removal of liens
children.text: The Secretary may, in consultation with tribal governments and other entities described in , periodically remove liens referred to in paragraph (1) from interests in land acquired by the Secretary.section 2212(b)(3) of this title

children.heading: Tribe not treated as party to lease; no effect on tribal sovereignty, immunity
children.label: c Tribe not treated as party to lease; no effect on tribal sovereignty, immunity

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Paragraph (2) shall apply with respect to any undivided interest in allotted land held by the Secretary in trust for a tribe if a lease or agreement under subsection (a) is otherwise applicable to such undivided interest by reason of this section even though the Indian tribe did not consent to the lease or agreement.

children.heading: Application of lease
children.label: 2 Application of lease
children.text: The lease or agreement described in paragraph (1) shall apply to the portion of the undivided interest in allotted land described in such paragraph (including entitlement of the Indian tribe to payment under the lease or agreement), and the Indian tribe shall not be treated as being a party to the lease or agreement. Nothing in this section (or in the lease or agreement) shall be construed to affect the sovereignty of the Indian tribe.
